name: Thrall
description: A Bruiser who can hold his own in a lane of battle.
title: Warchief of the Horde
info: As a child, Thrall served the cruel Aedelas Blackmoore as a slave. After gaining his freedom, he guided the liberated orcs to a land of their own and worked to recover their ancient traditions. Now and forever he is the Warchief of the Horde.

Thrall.name: Chain Lightning
Thrall.description: Shock an enemy with lightning, dealing 170 (+4% per level) damage. The lightning then bounces 3 times to nearby enemies, dealing 85 (+4% per level) damage to each enemy hit.

Thrall.name: Feral Spirit
Thrall.description: Unleash a Feral Spirit that deals 153 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in its path and Roots Heroes hit for 1 second. Each Hero hit increases the distance traveled by 25%.

Thrall.name: Windfury
Thrall.description: Increase Thrall's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds. His next 3 Basic Attacks occur 100% faster and generate stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.

Thrall.name: Sundering
Thrall.description: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 (+4% per level) damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.

Thrall.name: Earthquake
Thrall.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.

Thrall.name: Frostwolf Resilience
Thrall.description: Dealing damage with Abilities grants 1 stack of Frostwolf Resilience. At 5 stacks, Thrall is instantly healed for 240 (+4% per level) Health.

1.name: Echo of the Elements
1.description: Quest: Kill Minions or Heroes within 2 seconds of hitting them with Chain Lightning.  Reward: After killing 20 enemies, reduce the Mana cost of Chain Lightning from 40 to 20.  Reward: After killing 50 enemies, Chain Lightning gains an extra charge.  Mythic Reward: After killing 125 enemies, Chain Lightning can now strike the same target multiple times, and also strikes 1 additional target per bounce.

1.name: Crash Lightning
1.description: Quest: Hit at least 2 Heroes with a single use of Chain Lightning. Upon dying, lose 4 stacks. Gained rewards cannot be lost.  Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 15 times, Chain Lightning deals 270 additional damage on its bounces after the initial strike.  Mythic Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 30 times, Chain Lightning deals 325 additional damage on its bounces, and prioritizes bouncing to enemy Heroes.

1.name: Maelstrom Weapon
1.description: Quest: Basic Attack Heroes while Windfury's Movement Speed bonus is active.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, increase the Movement Speed bonus of Windfury to 40% and Thrall's Basic Attacks deal 40 additional damage.  Reward: After hitting 55 Heroes, Thrall permanently gains 15% increased Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks gain an additional 75 damage.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 100 Heroes, Frostwolf Resilience healing restores 200% more Health.

4.name: Feral Resilience
4.description: Heroes damaged by Feral Spirit grant 4 stacks of Frostwolf Resilience and 2 stacks of Feral Resilience, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next incoming Hero Basic Attack.  Stacks are consumed on the next cast of Feral Spirit.

4.name: Frostwolf Pack
4.description: Quest: Hit 6 Heroes with Feral Spirit. Progress is lost on death and when Thrall fails to hit a Hero.  Reward: Reduce the cooldown and Mana cost of Feral Spirit by 50%.

4.name: Mana Tide
4.description: Frostwolf Resilience restores 15 Mana and reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Rolling Thunder
7.description: Passive: Chain Lightning bounces an additional time.  For 8 seconds after hitting an enemy with Chain Lightning, Thrall's next Basic Attack against them grants a stack of Frostwolf Resilience. If the target is an enemy Hero, then he also deals damage to them equal to 3% of their maximum Health and healing for the same amount.

7.name: Ancestral Wrath
7.description: Activate to consume 8 stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for 15% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds, and healing Thrall for 150% of the damage dealt.  Gain 1 stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.

7.name: Elemental Assault
7.description: After using an Ability, Thrall's next Basic Attack within 4 seconds deals 45% more damage.

10.name: Sundering
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 (+4% per level) damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.

10.name: Earthquake
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.

13.name: Grace Of Air
13.description: Windfury attacks grant twice as many stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.

13.name: Frostwolf's Grace
13.description: Frostwolf Resilience can be activated to instantly heal. This healing is increased by up to 100% based on Thrall's missing health.

13.name: Spirit Shield
13.description: Every 45 seconds, gain 70 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 4 seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by 10 seconds.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

16.name: Tempest Fury
16.description: The final strike of Windfury hits 3 times for 75% normal damage. These hits do not provide quest progress.

16.name: Thunderstorm
16.description: Chain Lightning Slows the primary target by 8% for 2 seconds when used on Heroes.  Quest: Targeting a Hero directly with Chain Lightning increases this Slow by 8%, up to an additional 40%.  Reward: While at a 40% bonus, Chain Lightning's damage is increased by 30%.  Bonuses are reset if Chain Lightning is used on the same Hero it was last used on, or if Thrall dies.

16.name: Alpha Wolf
16.description: For 3 seconds after a Hero is hit by Feral Spirit, Thrall's Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 3% of the target's maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Feral Spirit's Root to 1.5 seconds.

20.name: Worldbreaker
20.description: Lower the cooldown of Sundering by 40 seconds. After Sundering impacts, it leaves behind an impassable rift, blocking unit movement for 3 seconds.

20.name: Earthen Shields
20.description: Allies within the Earthquake area gain a Shield equal to 15% of their maximum Health each pulse. This shield lasts 4 seconds.

20.name: Elemental Momentum
20.description: Basic Attacks reduce Thrall's Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns by 0.25 seconds, tripled against Heroes.

20.name: Nexus Blades
20.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.

20.name: Wind Rush
20.description: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.

tooltipMarkup.NexusBladesTalent: Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NexusBladesCarryBehavior,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NexusBladesSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NexusBladesSlow,Duration" player="0"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.Sundering: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ThrallSundering,FinishTime" precision="1"/></c> seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,SunderingDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallSunderingStun,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallAlphaWolf: For <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallFeralSpiritAlphaWolfTalentMarker,Duration"/></c> seconds after a Hero is hit by Feral Spirit, Thrall's Basic Attacks against them deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ThrallFeralSpiritAlphaWolfTalentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of the target's maximum Health as damage.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Feral Spirit's Root to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallFeralSpiritRoot,Duration+Talent,ThrallAlphaWolf,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"precision="1"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallAncestralWrath: Activate to consume <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ThrallAncestralWrath,Cost.Charge.CountUse"/></c> stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,ThrallAncestralWrathDebuff,PeriodCount+1)*(100*Effect,ThrallAncestralWrathDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life])"/>%</c> of their maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallAncestralWrathDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, and healing Thrall for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> of the damage dealt.<n/><n/>Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallChainLightning: Shock an enemy with lightning, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ThrallChainLightningInitialDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. The lightning then bounces <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times to nearby enemies, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ThrallChainLightningBounce1Damage,Amount"/></c> damage to each enemy hit.

Gained rewards cannot be lost.Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes times, Chain Lightning deals additional damage on its bounces after the initial strike.Mythic Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes times, Chain Lightning deals additional damage on its bounces, and prioritizes bouncing to enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallEarthenShieldsTalent: Allies within the Earthquake area gain a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of their maximum Health each pulse. This shield lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallEarthenShield,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallEarthquake: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ThrallEarthquake,FinishTime" precision="1"/></c> seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ThrallEarthquakeInitialPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[1]"/></c> seconds. Each pulse lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ThrallEarthquakePeriodicPersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,ThrallEarthquakePeriodicPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ThrallEarthquakeSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>, and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ThrallEarthquakeHeroDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemy Heroes. Does <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3 </c>pulses.

tooltipMarkup.ThrallElementalAssault: After using an Ability, Thrall's next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallElementalAssaultBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ThrallWeaponAttackDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ElementalAssault].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallElementalMomentum: Basic Attacks reduce Thrall's Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,ThrallElementalMomentumModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse" precision ="2"/></c> seconds, tripled against Heroes.

Each Hero hit increases the distance traveled by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

tooltipMarkup.ThrallFrostwolfResilienceSurgeOfHealing: Frostwolf Resilience can be activated to instantly heal. This healing is increased by up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,ThrallFrostwolfsGraceAccumulator,Ratio*100"/>%</c> based on Thrall's missing health.
tooltipMarkup.ThrallGraceOfAirTalent: Windfury attacks grant twice as many stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.

tooltipMarkup.ThrallSpiritShield: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallSpiritShieldCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallSpiritShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallSpiritShieldActive,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ThrallSpiritShieldModifyCooldownDuration,Value"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

tooltipMarkup.ThrallThunderstorm: Chain Lightning Slows the primary target by % for seconds when used on Heroes.Quest: Targeting a Hero directly with Chain Lightning increases this Slow by %, up to an additional %.Reward: While at a % bonus, Chain Lightning's damage is increased by %.Bonuses are reset if Chain Lightning is used on the same Hero it was last used on, or if Thrall dies.

tooltipMarkup.ThrallWorldbreakerTalent: Lower the cooldown of Sundering by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ThrallMasteryWorldbreaker,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. After Sundering impacts, it leaves behind an impassable rift, blocking unit movement for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ThrallSunderingPathingBlockerTimedLife,Duration-1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.Windfury: Increase Thrall's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,WindfurySpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WindfurySpeedBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. His next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WindfuryStack,MaxStackCount"/> </c>Basic Attacks occur <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,WindfuryStacksEnabledBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> faster and generate stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.
